C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF, EDWARD M. FONTANILLA AND DEFENDANT JOSEPH TESORO. PRIMA FACIA CASE PRESENTED BY PLAINTIFF'S. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS, S/E. PLTFS. EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND CONSIDERING THE EXHIBITS ORERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT JOSEPH TESORO FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AND FOR $1,038.14 PRINCIPAL WHICH INCLUDES $700.00 PAST DUE RENT AND $338.14 IN UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAILY DAMAGES. COST WAIVED. VISITING JUDGE ERIC LABOWITZ, PRESIDING. KIM REIFEIN, REPORTER. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TESORO, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 SADOWA STREET RM. #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,038.14 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,038.14, LEASE FORFEITED
